name: one-signal
description: One Signal × Claude Code — trace every session (turns, tool calls, tokens, cost) to your One Infra organization

ONE_SIGNAL_BASE_URL.title: One Infra connector URL
ONE_SIGNAL_BASE_URL.description: Base URL of your One Connector deployment. The hook POSTs to <this>/api/v1/observe/ingest.

ONE_SIGNAL_API_TOKEN.title: One Connector access token
ONE_SIGNAL_API_TOKEN.description: oc_... token from Console → Access tokens

ONE_SIGNAL_USER_ID.title: User ID
ONE_SIGNAL_USER_ID.description: Optional user identifier attached to every trace (shown as the user in One Signal). Leave empty to omit.

CC_ONE_SIGNAL_MAX_CHARS.title: Max characters per field
CC_ONE_SIGNAL_MAX_CHARS.description: Truncate captured inputs/outputs to this many characters

CC_ONE_SIGNAL_SKILL_TAGS.title: Tag traces with skills
CC_ONE_SIGNAL_SKILL_TAGS.description: Add a skill:<name> tag to traces for every skill invoked in the turn

CC_ONE_SIGNAL_CAPTURE_SKILL_CONTENT.title: Capture skill instructions
CC_ONE_SIGNAL_CAPTURE_SKILL_CONTENT.description: Include the injected skill instruction text in the Skill tool span output
